# Oleh Fedkiv

> Full-stack developer focused on fast business websites, lead-focused landing pages, MVP web applications, and API/CRM integrations.

Canonical site: https://www.fedkiv.tech
Primary language: English
Additional language: Ukrainian
Location: Lviv, Ukraine
Contact: fedkiv20172@gmail.com

## Services

- Lead-Focused Landing Page: conversion-oriented landing pages with technical SEO, responsive implementation, contact forms, analytics-ready structure, and fast launch cycles.
- MVP Web Application: focused full-stack Next.js applications for validating product ideas and launching early versions without overbuilding.
- API & CRM Integration: integrations between websites, CRMs, payment providers, booking tools, Telegram, REST APIs, GraphQL APIs, and internal systems.
